title: Acrylic Paint Pens - Metallic Marker Pens 2 Gold & 2 Silver Acrylic Pen - Set of 4 Paint Markers 0.7mm Extra Fine Tip - Ideal for Fabric, Glass, Wood, Canvas, Ceramic, Porcelain, Rock Painting
features: Acrylic Paint Pens: These fast-drying metallic marker pens give vivid, opaque, & glossy finishes with semi-permanent ink.
Multi Surface Acrylic Markers: These acrylic pens are ideal for fabric, wood, glass, canvas, ceramic, plastic, rock painting & more
Paint Pen Safe for Kids: Our silver fabric pens & gold pens metallic have a comfortable round grip, and the water-based acrylic ink is safe & odor-free
Paint Markers for Detailing: Use these metallic pens for scrapbooking, and writing on jars, ornaments, cards, & more. Perfect for detailing and outlining
Long-Lasting Metallic Pens: Our professional 3ml acrylic paint markers provide smudge-resistant, fade-proof color for lasting artwork.
description: Acrylic paint pens set of 4 metallic marker pens, 2 metallic gold pens and 2 silver acrylic markers. These acrylic pens are designed for vibrant details in any project. Made from professional-grade acrylic paint, these metallic pens feature durable nylon tips for a smooth flow. The rounded bodies ensure comfortable handling, while extra-fine 0.7 mm tips are perfect for fine lines, detailing, and highlights. The water-based ink is quick-drying and semi-permanent, ensuring long-lasting results that won’t smudge or fade. These environmentally friendly, odorless paint markers are safe for kids and suitable for use on various surfaces, including wood, plastic, metal, glass, pottery, and ceramics. Each acrylic paint pen is compact, measuring 13.2 cm long and 1.1 cm wide, making it easy to carry and store. Use these gold and silver pens for intricate designs on custom mugs, glassware, or painted stones. To set your artwork on glass or ceramics, bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Shake the paint marker, press the tip to release air, and test on paper before applying. Store horizontally and cap securely after use. Each glass pen is shrink-wrapped to prevent leaks and drying, keeping your supplies ready for creativity. This versatile set is perfect for all your crafting needs, including fabric pens permanent for clothes, glass paint pens, and metallic pens for scrapbooking. With options like gold marker pen and silver paint pen, you can create unique projects. Use metallic paint pens for eye-catching accents,personalizing textiles, and precision in intricate glass, rock painting, and more.
